summary: Tested Touch2Sign backend APIs (8 pytest cases) and frontend flows (marketing + app shell). All backend endpoints (health, dashboard/stats, documents, verifications, demo POST/GET, validation 422s) pass. Frontend homepage, nav, pricing, sign-in, app dashboard, documents (rows/filter/search), signatures kanban, verification, and settings all work. Demo form submission successfully hits POST /api/demo and shows the green success panel.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores created_at as ISO string in Mongo but Pydantic model expects datetime — currently handled via isoformat/fromisoformat conversion in list endpoint (works, but mixing types is fragile).
Shadcn Select trigger for team-size on /contact may have a non-visible hit area in some viewports (Playwright reported 'not visible'); consider verifying accessibility of the trigger element.
seed_data_creation: Demo request seeded via test_demo_post_valid_and_persist (TEST_ prefixed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api. SES intentionally unconfigured (email_sent:false). Seed docs = 6, verifications = 5, dashboard stats = 4 + activity = 5. Team-size Select uses en-dash '11–50'.
